name: Latest Youtube Video Workflow
on:
  schedule: 
    - cron: '0 0 * * 3' 
  workflow_dispatch: 
jobs:
  update-readme-with-blog:
    name: Updated The Readme With Latest Youtube Videos List.
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v2
      - uses: gautamkrishnar/blog-post-workflow@master
        with:
          comment_tag_name: "YOUTUBE"
          feed_list: "https://www.youtube.com/feeds/videos.xml?channel_id=UCrUIskDMtKQ746huQVtSwog"
